news.headline: Ownership disclosure for Primary Health Properties Plc indicated in Form 8.3.

news.summary: Quid Miner is a green cloud mining service provider based in the UK that allows users to mine Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin without owning equipment. Users can select a contract to start mining and remote rent professional mining equipment. The platform supports various cryptocurrencies and offers services to make cryptocurrency investment more convenient. Quid Miner offers a $15 bonus upon creating an account and operates legally with high security measures in place. McAfee SECURE and Cloudflare SECURE protect the platform, ensuring bank-level hosting security and multi-layer encryption. Full story available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Quid Miner offers cloud mining for Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin without a mining machine. UK-based, legal service. Get $15 bonus. Full review on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: The article compares the state of subway stations in New York versus Moscow and Shanghai, pointing out structural issues that contribute to America's $34 trillion federal debt. In New York City, the Consumer-Directed Personal Assistance Program (CDPAP) saw a significant increase in service hours between 2018 and mid-2023, with wages now accounting for one in eight private-sector paychecks in the city. Meanwhile, tradables' share of GDP in the United States is at approximately 19%, significantly lower than China and Russia. The U.S. also faces a trade deficit of $1.1 trillion in goods and services. The $1.2 trillion Infrastructure Bill money has been slow to be put to use, with many projects still in the design or permitting stages. For instance, the Francis Scott Key Bridge in Baltimore remains under construction, while the Crimean Bridge in Russia, bombed in 2022, was quickly restored. The article highlights the challenges facing the U.S. in delivering public goods efficiently and effectively.
news.headline: America's $34 trillion federal debt is a symptom of larger issues: low-productivity services, shrinking tradables share, and delays in public works.

news.summary: OPTO Miner, a popular cloud mining platform in the UK, has launched a new mobile application allowing users to access permanent free cloud mining for cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Litecoin, and Dogecoin. The app enables users to monitor mining progress, real-time income, and make personalized settings from anywhere, enhancing efficiency and convenience. This democratization of cryptocurrency aims to make cloud mining accessible to ordinary people. The app stands out for its user-friendly interface, top-level security protection, and instant rewards for new users. OPTO Miner's goal is to provide convenient and secure access to cloud mining, enabling users to mine on the go and manage their investments easily.
news.headline: OPTO Miner launches mobile app for cloud mining, supports various cryptocurrencies. Users can monitor progress, income, and make personalized settings on the go. App ensures security with McAfee and Cloudflare. Summarized in 99 characters.

news.summary: Tokenized treasury protocols are experiencing a notable increase in yields, with experts predicting this trend to continue due to macroeconomic factors. According to Marko Vidrih, Co-founder and COO of RWA.io, these higher yields are not merely a short-term opportunity but a sustainable shift reshaping on-chain yield generation. Vidrih highlights that these yields are influenced by rising interest rates and offer a stable investment option compared to volatile DeFi protocols. The connection between tokenized treasuries and U.S. Treasuries, which hold the backing of the U.S. government's credit and interest rates, is cited as a key factor in the sustained growth of these yields. This trend signifies a shift towards reliable investments in the digital asset realm, with tokenized treasury protocols standing out as a promising alternative to on-chain stablecoin lending. Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Tokenized treasuries offer sustainable yields vs. DeFi lending, due to macro factors. RWA.io's Marko Vidrih sees potential in reshaping on-chain yield gen. Higher yields reflect stable investments in digital assets landscape. Yields driven by rising interest rates, making them more reliable. Direct link to U.S. Treasuries contribute to sustainability.

news.summary: A new model called AXIOM has gained attention in both mainstream headlines and within the industry. The model has received acclaim from various sources, with its unique features and advancements garnering praise. It has quickly become a popular topic of discussion, with mentions in numerous news outlets and receiving positive feedback from experts in the field. The unprecedented success of the AXIOM model has solidified its reputation, with a significant increase in demand and interest from consumers and professionals alike.
news.headline: VERSES® "Digital Brain" AXIOM model gains media attention; featured in WIRED and Popular Mechanics.

news.summary: A technology company headquartered in Redwood City, California, Informatica (NYSE: INFA), which specializes in AI-driven enterprise cloud data management, has revealed an extensive growth in its collaboration with Databricks during the 2025 Data + AI Summit. The partnership expansion includes Informatica's role as a debut collaborator for two pivotal advancements by Databricks—Managed Iceberg Tables and Databricks Lakebase, an innovative database designed specifically for AI applications. Furthermore, Informatica introduced improvements tailored towards AI, known as GenAI-focused enhancements, to its Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC).
news.headline: Informatica partners with Databricks for Managed Iceberg Tables & OLTP service. Launches GenAI enhancements at Data + AI Summit 2025.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, TELUS Digital Experience revealed today that it has received an unsolicited non-binding proposal from TELUS Corporation to acquire all outstanding multiple voting shares and subordinate voting shares of TELUS Digital, not currently owned by TELUS Corporation. The proposal suggests a purchase price of U (NYSE and TSX: TIXT) will be the acquirer, while TELUS Corporation is listed under (TSX: T, NYSE: TU).
news.headline: TELUS Digital receives non-binding proposal from TELUS Corp to acquire 100% of outstanding shares, purchase price TBD.

news.summary: GE HealthCare has revealed the integration of its proprietary features and algorithms with MIM Encore, signifying a major advancement in their endeavor to provide precise care through advanced digital solutions. This union combines GE HealthCare's unique offerings with MIM Encore, a state-of-the-art single platform design tailored to strengthen diagnostic capabilities for healthcare facilities utilizing GE HealthCare systems alongside MIM software. This collaboration aims to enhance diagnostics for these organizations by incorporating innovative features based on feedback from users.
news.headline: GE HealthCare introduces MIM Encore, combining features with proprietary algorithms for precision care, benefiting healthcare organizations.

news.headline: ZoomInfo wins TrustRadius' Top Rated Awards for customer satisfaction in 9 categories, receiving top ratings.

news.summary: MACOM Technology Solutions Inc. has unveiled a cutting-edge collection of RF solutions designed to address the rigorous needs of sophisticated radar systems. This suite includes a range of products catering to higher frequencies, with capabilities exceeding 500 GHz, providing optimal performance for radar applications. The innovations by MACOM offer unprecedented precision and efficiency, delivering enhanced functionality to radar technologies.
news.headline: MACOM previewing new RF solutions for advanced radar systems in IMS 2025.

news.summary: Enhancing business opportunities and increasing revenue streams have become key focuses for many companies. This strategic shift is opening up novel commercial avenues leading to a significant growth in revenue generation. Companies are exploring diverse strategies and innovative approaches to boost their financial performance. This shift not only amplifies revenue but also enhances the overall commercial potential, propelling businesses towards higher success rates. By expanding revenue-generating operations, companies are poised to capitalize on these fresh opportunities, creating a more robust and sustainable business model.
news.headline: Sky Quarry in Utah seeks recycling permit for integrated energy facility to boost revenue with new commercial pathways.

news.summary: In San Francisco, internet infrastructure solutions provider Meter disclosed raising $170 million in a Series C funding round. The funding was led by Hemant Taneja from General Catalyst, alongside contributions from investors including Baillie Gifford, Lachy Groom, J.P. Morgan, Microsoft, Sequoia Capital, Tishman Speyer, WndrCo, and 53 Stations, both new and existing. Meter specializes in delivering dependable, secure, and expandable internet, Wi-Fi, and cellular connectivity tailored for enterprise use.
news.headline: Meter secures $170M in Series C funding led by Hemant Taneja at General Catalyst, with backing from various investors.

news.summary: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, Ag Growth International Inc. (TSX: AFN) has successfully exercised the over-allotment option for its offering of convertible unsecured subordinated debentures. An additional $12.75 million in aggregate principal amount of Debentures has been issued, making the total offering now at $97.75 million. The Debentures will accrue interest from the date of issuance.
news.headline: AGI exercises over-allotment option for $12.75M in convertible debentures, increasing total offering to $97.75M.

news.summary: In Weaverville, North Carolina, Zamnesia, a prominent online Smartshop in Europe and established U.S. digital retailer, has initiated an exclusive collaboration with TICAL, the cannabis brand created by hip-hop icon Method Man. This partnership showcases eight top-tier cannabis seeds available solely through Zamnesia in the U.S. and Europe. The TICAL x Zamnesia venture highlights Method Man's renowned 'Killa Bee' emblem, promoting a lifestyle fostering creativity, inclusivity, and a deep connection to cannabis culture.
news.headline: Method Man partners with Zamnesia for exclusive cannabis seed launch, featuring 8 premium seeds in US and Europe.

news.summary: RH, listed on NYSE as RH, is set to report its first-quarter earnings after Thursday's closing bell. Analysts predict a loss per share of 7 cents, an improvement from the 40 cents loss per share reported a year ago. The California-based company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $818.57 million, up from $726.96 million in the previous year. Lisa Chi was appointed as President and Co-Chief Merchandising & Creative Officer on May 20. RH's shares closed at $178.98 on Wednesday, marking a 5.5% decrease. Readers looking for the latest analyst ratings can browse through the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where they can filter by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other criteria.
news.headline: RH likely to report a Q1 loss of 7 cents/share, narrower than last year's 40 cents/share, with revenue expected to reach $818.57 million, up from $726.96 million last year. RH shares fell 5.5%, closing at $178.98.

news.summary: In May, producer prices rebounded slightly after a decline in April, showing no significant inflation concerns due to tariffs and supply chain issues. The Producer Price Index (PPI) increased by 2.6% compared to the previous year, slightly higher than April's revised 2.5%. Monthly, the PPI rose by 0.1%, reversing April's 0.2% decline, falling short of the expected 0.2%. Core PPI, excluding food and energy prices and crucial for measuring underlying inflation, decreased to 3% annually. These figures were reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, indicating that broader economic impacts from tariffs and supply chain disruptions have not yet been widespread. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: May producer inflation rises to 2.6% annually, below forecasts. Jobless claims reveal labor market weaknesses.

news.summary: RIMining, a cloud mining platform in London with over 10 years of experience, has launched a new mobile cryptocurrency mining app allowing users to mine Bitcoin, Dogecoin, Litecoin, and Solana directly from their smartphones. The app aims to simplify the mining process, eliminating the need for specialized hardware and making crypto mining more accessible. The app is available on Android and iOS, offering features like monitoring hash rate performance, tracking daily earnings, and managing contracts. New users receive a $15 bonus and daily login rewards. More details on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: RIMining launches updated mining app, supports BTC, DOGE, LTC, SOL. Users earn 1,000 points/day, free $15 bonus for new users.

news.summary: Taxbit, a leading platform for tax and accounting compliance of digital assets, has partnered with the Global Blockchain Business Council (GBBC), a prominent non-profit association in the blockchain and emerging technology sector. The collaboration involves GBBC, an organization with operations in the US, EMEA, and APAC regions, choosing Taxbit to assist with its financial reporting obligations. This partnership marks a significant step for Taxbit in expanding its impact within the digital assets industry through a key association with a well-established organization like GBBC.
news.headline: Taxbit partners with GBBC to support cryptocurrency management needs. GBBC is multinational with US, EMEA, and APAC operations.

news.summary: In Seattle, a recent survey commissioned by Redfin revealed that 51.2% of homeowners and renters across the U.S. believe that reduced immigration will lead to a decrease in construction workers, subsequently decreasing the number of new homes and raising home prices. Conversely, 38.5% of respondents hold the opposite belief. This data, linked to NASDAQ symbol RDFN, indicates a divided perspective regarding the impact of immigration on the housing market.
news.headline: Over 50% of Americans believe less immigration leads to fewer construction workers, making homes more expensive.

news.summary: A world-renowned tech company, Qlik, is set to showcase its cutting-edge developments in agentic AI and Open Lakehouse technology during the 2025 global AI Reality Tour. The tour will span across the Americas, EMEA, and APAC regions, reaching a wide audience of tech enthusiasts and industry professionals. This initiative aims to bring the latest advancements in AI technology to a global stage, highlighting Qlik's commitment to innovation and progress in the field.
news.headline: Qlik launches global AI Reality Tour to showcase agentic AI and Open Lakehouse innovations across Americas, EMEA, APAC by 2025.

news.summary: Dublin-based Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a prominent global security products and solutions provider, has announced the signing of a definitive agreement to purchase ELATEC, which includes Elatec GmbH and affiliated entities, from Summit Partners for €330 million in a cash-free, debt-free deal. Allegion plans to finance this acquisition utilizing a mixture of available cash reserves and borrowing from its current revolving credit facility. ELATEC is a major manufacturer in the industry.
news.headline: Allegion to acquire ELATEC for €330 million to bolster electronics portfolio, enhancing reader and credential technology.

news.summary: In Oldwick, New Jersey, institutional investors and regulatory clarity are identified as key drivers for insurance growth in the emerging cryptocurrency sector, as per a recent commentary by AM Best. Quantifying the size of the cryptocurrency and digital asset insurance market proves difficult due to varying survey results on digital asset ownership in the US population. The commentary suggests that increasing insurance penetration in the crypto industry may be supported by growing interest from institutional investors.
news.headline: Increasing interest from institutions and regulatory clarity may drive insurance growth in the crypto market. Ownership of digital assets in the US varies widely. AM Best notes challenges in quantifying the emerging crypto insurance segment.

news.summary: IMAX Corporation (NYSE: IMAX) in New York has revealed an extension of their share repurchase program by $100 million, now totaling $500 million, until June 30, 2027. This increment leaves around $250 million accessible for repurchases. They have already bought back 15.1 million common shares, constituting a 23% decrease in outstanding shares.
news.headline: IMAX increases share repurchase program by $100 million, extending to June 2027. Total repurchase authorization now $500 million. 15.1 million shares repurchased, 23% reduction in outstanding shares.

news.summary: BlueSnap, a worldwide payment orchestration platform for prominent B2B and B2C enterprises, has been chosen by FlightLogger as its international payments provider. This partnership will provide global payment functionalities, enhancing financial options and accessibility for trainee pilots. FlightLogger, a top-flight training management software firm supported by Arcadea Group, a major private equity company, serves 200 flight schools in over 50 nations.
news.headline: BlueSnap partners with FlightLogger for international payments, aiding 200 flight schools in 50 countries.

news.summary: EMD Serono, a leading science and technology company and the Healthcare business of Merck KGaA in the U.S. and Canada, disclosed detailed outcomes from Cohort B of the global Phase 2 WILLOW study (NCT05162586). The study examined enpatoran, a new oral TLR7/8 inhibitor for systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE). While it failed to achieve the primary goal of dose-responsiveness, the results were presented today. This information is not intended for media outside the U.S. or Canada.
news.headline: EMD Serono shares findings on Enpatoran in SLE at EULAR 2025. Study NCT05162586 shows potential of TLR7/8 Inhibitor.

news.summary: In West Warwick, Rhode Island, AstroNova, Inc. has disclosed promotions within their leadership team to bolster the implementation of their growth strategy. The company, listed on Nasdaq as ALOT, aims to enhance performance through these strategic appointments.
news.headline: AstroNova promotes segment leaders to drive growth strategy execution (Nasdaq: ALOT).

news.summary: In Chicago, Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) has revealed a partnership with The Abrams Research Center on Neurogenomics at Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine. This long-term collaboration focuses on utilizing AI for accelerating advancements in Alzheimer's disease research. By utilizing Tempus’ Lens platform, which is powered by AI, the collaboration aims to conduct in-depth analysis and innovative discoveries.
news.headline: Tempus partners with Northwestern Univ Abrams Research Center on AI for Alzheimer's research using Lens platform.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the job market, with approximately 250,000 new jobs being created in the past month alone. Analysts attribute this positive trend to various factors such as economic growth, increased consumer spending, and expansion in key industries like technology and healthcare. The data also shows a notable increase in workforce participation, indicating more people are actively seeking employment opportunities. Overall, the declining unemployment rate is seen as a promising sign for the country's economy as it continues to recover from the effects of the recent recession.
news.headline: Transcat plans to attend Northland Growth Conference in 2025, looking to expand potential opportunities.

news.summary: In London, flexible AMOLED displays are rapidly taking over as the primary display technology in smartphones, as per Omdia’s latest Smartphone Model Market Tracker. In Q1 2025, smartphones featuring AMOLED screens made up 63% of total global shipments, a significant increase from 57% in the preceding year. Conversely, LCD-equipped smartphones fell to 37%, marking a consistent decrease. The boost in AMOLED adoption is chiefly attributed to flexible AMOLED panels.
news.headline: Flexible AMOLED displays power 57% of global smartphone shipments; up from 57% in Q1 2024; LCD-based smartphones drop to 37%.

news.summary: A renowned clean energy software company, Stem, revealed its partnership with Norbut Solar Farms (NSF), a top community solar developer in the New York ISO (NYISO) power market. Stem's PowerTrack™ software will be adopted by NSF to efficiently handle their increasing solar projects portfolio. This strategic alliance is expected to enhance NSF's Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) strategy, facilitating the rapid deployment of more clean energy projects. Stem, listed on NYSE as STEM, specializes in AI-driven solutions and services for sustainable energy initiatives.
news.headline: Stem partners with Norbut Solar Farms, using PowerTrack™ software to scale solar projects, aiding EPC growth in NY ISO market.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Calgary, Alberta, Acceleware® Ltd. ("Acceleware" or "the Company") (TSX-V: AXE), known for pioneering radio frequency (RF) power-to-heat technologies for critical minerals, carbon capture amine regeneration, enhanced oil production, revealed a new strategic plan. This initiative aims to revolutionize their approach towards process heat applications and other endeavors.
news.headline: Acceleware plans strategic growth with new plan targeting innovations in RF power-to-heat technologies.
